upasargachandrika.example_text: 'udapAnASca kumBASca prAsiYcan SataSo jalam' (BA॰u॰84.7) prAsiYcan=prAkzArayan
'udakAYjaliM prasiYcet' (drA॰gf॰1.2) prasiYcet avasiYcet
'ityeBirhetuBistasya triBiScittaM prasicyate (BA॰SAM॰28.7) dravati klinnaM SlaTaM BavatItyAha
'yallohamayaH syAtprasicyeta' (Sa॰brA॰14.2.2.54) prasicyeta draveta drutaM syannaM syAdityAha
'sakftprasiYcantyudakaM nAmagotreRa vAgyatAH' (yAjYa0 35) prasiYcanti parAsiYcanti
'yo hEnaM tatra brUyAtparAsiYcata nvA ayamagnihotram' (Sa॰brA॰12.4.2.9) acCardayadityAha
'parA vA eza sicyate yo'balo'SvameDena yajate' (Sa॰brA॰13.1.6.3) parAsicyate=parAsyate=parABUyate
'parA tat sicyate rAzwraM brAhmaRo yatra jIyate' (aTarva॰5.19.6) parAsicyate=sampadA hIyate jIyate=kzIyate=hIyate jyA vayohAnO yaki samprasAraRaM dIrGaSca
'parAsiktaM vipulaM svaM balOGam' (BA॰u॰48.22) parAsiktaM dUre kziptaM nirastam
'parAsiktAnDArtarAzwrAMSca vidDi' (BA॰u॰29.50) nirDUtAn sampadA hInAn iti nIlakaRWaH

'mA parAseci mat payaH' (Apa॰SrO॰4.4.14.4) atra acCidraH prajayA BUyAsam iti praTamaScaraRaH dravadravyasya karmatve sicermuKyA vfttiranyatropacAro'sya yaTA''paH parAsicyante pAtrAdudDftya pravAhyanta evaM dravyAntarARi rAjAdIni parAsicyante'pAkriyante atrodAhftizUpacAraH siceH mA parAseci matpaya ityekAM varjayitvA aho vAgvEdagDIvilAso vaSyavAcAM prAcAM mantradfSAm
'mA no gayamAre asmat parA sicaH' (f0 9813) mA'smat parAsicaH=dUre mA preraya
'gayaM Danam mA parAseci madDanam' (SAM0 gf0 344) mA parAseci mA parAsi
'ko hi kzate kzAramivAvasiYcet' (avadA0 jA0 26 29) avasiYcet=upari pAtayet
'mOYjEH parvasu badDvA piYjUliBirAplAvayati' (kO0 sU0 3234) avasiYcati vA
'dUrAdAvasaTAnmUtraM dUrAtpAdAvasecanam' (manu0 4151) pAdAvasecanam=pAdaprakzAlana jalaSezaH
'pradIpEH kAYcanEstatra ganDatElAvasecitEH' (BA0 BIzma0 9731) avasecitEH=kftAvasekEH avaseko nAma tElasya pradIpentarAsecanam
'SItalena jalenEnaM mUrcCantamavasecayet' (suSruta0 sUtra0 27 ) avasecayet tatra kAScana vipruzo'vapAtayet avaSabdaH kzAraRasyAlpatAmAha
SuciH--nizziktamasmAtpApakamiti nEruktAH' (ni0 661) nizziktaM nizkfzyAnyatra siktam iti durgaH
'paSya BUtAni duHKena vyatiziktAni sarvaSaH' (BA0 SAM0 17413) vyatiziktAni aBiziktAni aBivfzwAni vyAptAnItyArTiko'rTaH
'vyutseko'nUdyatAmeza nEvaM karmaRi sOmike' (jE0 nyA0 7311) darSapUrRamAsayordikzu sarvAsvApo viviDamutsicyante so'yaM vyutsekaH
'anena mantreRa yaddiSAM vyutsecanaM so'vaBfTa iti' (tE0 saM0 177 ityatra) BawwaBAskaraH utkzipya vAriRaH secanaM vyutsecanam
'A Darme siYca paya usriyAyAH' (aTarva0 7736) AsiYca prapUraya
'A te siYcAmi kukzyoH' (f0 8175) kukzeruBayo: pArSvayorAsiYcAmi pUrayAmItyAha

'Asecanam' (kA0 SrO0 954) uparyantarvokzaRam mahAvIraM karoti …prAdeSamAtramUrDvasAnumuparizwAdAsecanavantaM sannataM vAyavyaprakAram AsecanavAn sOziryopetaH tadAsecanakaM rUpaM tfpternAstyanto yasya darSanAt (amaraH)
'A siYcasva jaWare maDva Urmim' (tE0 saM0 1419) AsiYcasva ABimuKyena kzAraya
'Asecanavanti puzadAjyasya pUrayanti' (ASva0 gf0 4316) Asecanavanti bilavanti (pAtrARi)
'yasya tvayA vraRaviropaRamiNgudInAM tElaM nyazicyata muKe kuSasUcividDe' (SA0 416) nyazicyata akzAryata
'sOvarRaM rAjataM cApi yaTA BARqaM nizicyate' (BA0 SAM0 29011) tAmrAdimayaM pAtraM sOvarRena rAjatena vA rasena nizicyata ityarTaH
'niziYcanmADavImetAM latAM kOndIM ca nartayan' (vikrama0 24) niziYcan prajanaM prajananaM kArayan maDubinduBiraBivarzanniti ca
'nizekAdiH SmaSAnAnto mantrEryasyodito viDiH' (manu0 216) nizeko garBADAnam
'prajAnizekaM mayi vartamAnaM sUnoranuDyAyata cetaseti' (raGu0 1460) nizicyata iti nizekaH mAtari retaHsekaH
'yozitsu tadbIryanizekaBUmiH' (ku0 316) ukto'rTaH
'suKasalilanizekaH' (ftu0 128)
'tElanizekabindunA' (raGu0 838) tElasya nizekaH kzAraRaM nipAtaH
'nizecanaM bahizwe astu' (aTarva0 131) nizecanaM prasrAvaH
'glAyannudapAtraM nizicya' (kA0 SrO0 6104) nizicya ninIya Avarjya
'lakzmIrArye niziktA caturudaDipayaHsImayA sArDamurvyA' (sA0 da0 6110 ityatra vivaraRe) niziktA'rpitA
'udvA siYcaDvamupa vA pfRaDvam' (f0 71611) utsiYcavaDvam AmuKaM pUrayata
'(yAM surAM) siYcanti pariziYcanty utsiYcanti punanti ca' (vA0 saM0 2028)
'anu tIrTamapa utsiYcet' (bO0 Da0 2353) utkzipet UrDvaM kzipedityarTaH
'na tasyotsizice manaH' (raGu0 1743) notsizice utsekaM garvaM nAviSadityarTaH
'Bavyosmi BavitetyevaM vicintyotzice ca saH' (rAja0 82855) ukto'rTaH
'stUyamAnA notsicyante' (kAda0) samBAvitAtmAno na Bavanti AhopuruzikAM na saMvidantItyAha
'utsicyamAne payasi' (BA0 pu0) UzmaRA PenAyamAne
'arTavanto na cotsiktAH' (BA0 droRa0 14426) utsiktA garvitAH

'bAlavfdDAturARAM ca sAkzyezu vadatAM mfzA jAnIyAdasTirAM vAcamutsiktamanasAM taTA' (manu0 871).. utsiktamanasAM calacittAnAm avyavasTitamAnasAnAm utsiktamanasaH prakftyEvopaplutA aDIraDiya iti meDAtiTiH
'darpamutsiktametatte PAlguno nASayizyati' (BA0 droRa0 15912) utsiktaM pravfdDam
'anutsiktaM vE devAnAM haviH' (Sa0 brA0 32219) anutsiktaM bAhyavastunA'sampfktam
'tadDEka utsicya Cardayanti' (Sa0 brA0 12429) utsicya=AmuKaM pUrayitvA
'tAH (apaH) utsicyottareRa gArhapatyaM sAdayati' (Sa0 brA0 11118)
'tatpratyayamudakamutsicya' (Apa0 Da0 26159) utsicya=utkzipya
'utsecyA kalaSIBiH' (candrikA) (vidDa0) utsecyA kzArayitavyA kzAraRArhetyarTaH
'tezAm (sattvarajastamasAm) anyatamotseke viDAnamupadiSyate' (BA0 SAM0 1614 ASva0 125) utsekotireka udrekaH
'vErAgyavAsanotsekaH SlokenAnena sUcyate' (rAja0 4389) ukto'rTaH
'notsekAtpravadAmyaham' (rA0 5310) utseko garvaH
'upadA viviSuH SaSvannotsekAH kosaleSvaram' (raGu0 470)
'anutsekaH Kalu vikramAlaNkAraH' (vikrama0 1) anutseko garvABAvo vinayaH SAlInatA
'mAmakasyAsya sEnyasya hftotsekasya saMjaya avaSezaM na paSyAmi' (BA0 karRa0 71) utseko hfdayollAsaH utseko jalOGaSca kedArAn prati prApitodakasya kzudrasarasa iveti nIlakaRWaH
'tezAM pramAdasuptapralApAH kAmAdirutsekaH' (kO a0 11511)
'AcAryARAM codakotsecanamuBayatra' (go0 gf0 3312) udakotsecanaM jalAYjalyutkzepaRam utsecanaM sekapAtraM BavatyudakodaYcanam
'aTa yA etAH sruco nirRijyodIcIrapa utsiYcati tena fzIn prIRAti' (jE0 brA0 141) utsiYcati utkzipati Avarjayati bahirgamayati
'kUpa utsicyamAno hi BavecCudDo bahUdakaH' (skandapu0 mA0 kO0 2261) utsekaH parIvAha udaYcanamudDAraH
'kAmAdirutsekaH svAH prakftIH kopayati' (kO0 a0 971) utseko'tirekaH atiriktaH sevyamAnaH kAmAdirityarTaH
'padmaM bahurajaScandraH kzayI tAByAM tavAnanam samAnamapi sotsekam…' (kAvyAdarSe 230) sotsekaM sotkarzam aDikotkarzaSAli
'yatkAma idamaBiziYcAmi' (aTarva0 61225) aBiziYcAmi aBito ninayAmi idam idAnIm
'taTAByazikta vArIRi pitfByaH SokamUrcCitaH' (Bawwi0 623) salilaM nyavapat udakamakarodityarTaH
'tadyaTA jakzuze'BiziYcedevaM tat' (Sa0 brA0 24223) BuktavantamAplAvayedityarTaH
'saNge punarbahutarAmamftABiziktAm' (cOra0 29) amftenABivfzwAmityarTaH
'aTa vapuraBizektuM tAstadamBoBirIzuH' (SiSu0 775) aBizektumAplAvayitum
'agnivarRamaBizicya rAGavaH sve pade tanayam…' (raGu0 191) aBizecanenABizekapUrvakaM svasTAne pratizWApyetyarTaH
'aBizekaM karizyAmi tAsu nityamanuvratA' (rA0 22719) aBizekaM snAnam
'kftABizeko gaNgAyAm' (rA0 14430) ukto'rTaH
'upanIyatAM mantreRa saMBftaH kumArasyABizekaH' (vikrama0) ihABizekArTaM jalamaBizeka uktaH tAdarTyAttAcCabDam
'kiM puzkarajalEraBizecanena' (hari0 112) aBizecanaM snAnam
'adBiraByutziYcastriH prASnAti' (SAM0 gf0 383) aByutsiYcan upari jalamAsiYcannityarTaH
'gfhapataya eva vratamaByutsicya prayacCeyuH' (Sa0 brA0 34215) tAnUnaptramAjyaM payasA saMnIya dadyurityAha
'pratiziktA arAtayaH' (Apa0 SrO0 7202)
'apratizekyaM syAt tejaskAmasya' (Apa0 SrO0 6264) uparizwAdabbinduprakzepaH pratizeka iti rudradattaH
'siYcanti pariziYcantyutsiYcanti punanti ca' (vA0 saM0 2028) (yAM surAm) pariziYcanti paya AdiBirasyAH parizekaM kurvanti
'uto tadadya vidyAma yatastat parizicyate' (aTarva0 10829)
'SItamAlepanaM kAryaM parizekaSca SItalaH' (suSruta0 19166) parizekaH paritaH secanamudabindUnAM nipAtanam
'dArayanti SilAM parizekEH (va0 bf0 saM0 53116) tasya (saMsArataroH) ajYAnamADAraH pramAdaH parizecanam parizicyate'neneti parizecanaM jalam
'taM te mAtA pari yozA janitrI mahaH piturdama AsiYcadagre' (f0 3482)
'tadyaTA jaratkakzamagninopadIpya tamadBirupasiYcet' (jE0 brA0 2137) upasiYcet Ardrayet
'SunAsIrAvimAM vAcaM… payaH tenemAmupasiYcatam' (f0 4575) upasiYcatamupetya siYcatamiti maheSvaraH upasiYcatamArdrI kurutam ityanye
'vyaYjanErupasikte' (pA0 4426) daDnopasiktaM dADikam iti vfttiH ukto'rTaH
'duhantyUDarupasecanAya' (f0 10767) upasecanAya kzaraRAya
'trayaH koSAsa upasecanAsaH' (f0 71014) upasecanAsa upasektAra iti sAyaRaH upasecanasADanAni KajAkA darvyo vetyanye
'ftaM hastAvanejanaM kulyopasecanam' (aTarva0 11313) upasecanaM miSraRasADanam
'veti tvamupasecanI' (f0 10212) uparikzaraRaSIlA''hutiH rasamayaM haviriti yAvat
'mftyuryasyopasecanam' (kaWopa0 225) upasecanaM vyaYjanam
'vratamupotsiYcan vrataM pramIRAti' (Sa0 brA0 32219) vratAntaBojanaM bAhyavastunA saMmiSrayan
